execution_summary: Docker image built from python:3.10-slim with specified Python libraries. Added new Python analysis script to replicate preregistered 2 (Condition) × 3 (Dilemma-Type) mixed ANOVA. Adjusted path handling for SCORE_all data.sav. Ran analysis inside container; dataset (N = 160, after listwise deletion N = 156) loaded, reshaped, and analysed via pingouin.mixed_anova. ANOVA completed, results saved to /app/data/results. However pingouin could not calculate F for Condition × Dilemma-Type interaction (likely zero variance in Condition string coding), so interaction summary fields are null. No further debugging performed.

code_executed.logs: Mixed ANOVA table printed; interaction F, p, np2 returned None. Data load and reshape succeeded. Warning about SettingWithCopy.
code_executed.environment: Python 3.10-slim with pandas 2.x, numpy 1.23, pyreadstat 1.2, pingouin 0.5.3, statsmodels 0.14

results.hypothesis_tested: Condition × Dilemma-Type interaction predicting proportion rejecting harm (RH) – expecting Observed > Control particularly in personal dilemmas.

tables.table_description: Pingouin output for main and interaction effects
